summary: Thirteen military equipment targets assessed, all confirmed with NO DAMAGE; all are armored vehicles in motion, kicking up dust and showing no visible deformations, holes, or missing components. The overall scene depicts a large column of armored vehicles moving across an arid, dusty terrain under a partly cloudy sky, generating significant dust clouds as they advance. The consistent operational status of all assessed targets suggests the formation is actively maneuvering without combat damage or mechanical failure.
